response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a full-stack developer with a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, aligning well with the primary stack required. They have also demonstrated proficiency in multiple programming languages and technologies relevant to the role.
strengths: Proficient in TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Experience with AI agent development and various backend technologies
Strong background in software craftsmanship and testing
concerns: Limited direct experience with Nest.js and Vitest
Some skills like Kotlin/Java are not as prominently featured in recent experiences
Less emphasis on cloud platforms and containerization in recent roles
